1310   /**
1311    * Converts the specified object into an instance of this class.
1312    *
1313    * @param o The object to convert.
1314    * @return The converted object, or <jk>null</jk> if no conversion is available.
1315    */
1316   public T mutateFrom(Object o) {
1317      return BasicConverter.INSTANCE.to(o, inner());
1318   }
1319
1320   /**
1321    * Converts the specified object to the specified output type.
1322    *
1323    * @param <O> The output class.
1324    * @param o The object to convert.
1325    * @param c The target class.
1326    * @return The converted object, or <jk>null</jk> if no conversion is available.
1327    */
1328   public static <O> O mutateTo(Object o, Class<O> c) {
1329      return BasicConverter.INSTANCE.to(o, c);
1330   }
1331
1332   /**
1333    * Converts the specified object to the type represented by this class meta.
1334    *
1335    * @param <O> The output class.
1336    * @param o The object to convert.
1337    * @param c The target class meta.
1338    * @return The converted object, or <jk>null</jk> if no conversion is available.
1339    */
1340   public static <O> O mutateTo(Object o, ClassMeta<O> c) {
1341      return mutateTo(o, c.inner());
1342   }
1343
1344   /**
1345    * Create a new instance of the main class of this declared type.
1346    *
1347    * @return A new instance of the object, or <jk>null</jk> if there is no no-arg constructor on the object.
1348    * @throws ExecutableException Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.
1349    */
1350   @Override
1351   @SuppressWarnings({
1352      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for array instantiation
1353   })
1354   public T newInstance() throws ExecutableException {
1355      if (super.isArray())
1356         return (T)Array.newInstance(inner().getComponentType(), 0);
1357      if (noArgConstructor.isPresent())
1358         return noArgConstructor.get().newInstance();
1359      var h = getProxyInvocationHandler();
1360      if (nn(h))
1361         return (T)Proxy.newProxyInstance(this.getClass().getClassLoader(), a(inner(), java.io.Serializable.class), h);
1362      return null;
1363   }
1364
1365   /**
1366    * Same as {@link #newInstance()} except for instantiating non-static member classes.
1367    *
1368    * @param outer
1369    *    The instance of the owning object of the member class instance.
1370    *    Can be <jk>null</jk> if instantiating a non-member or static class.
1371    * @return A new instance of the object, or <jk>null</jk> if there is no no-arg constructor on the object.
1372    * @throws ExecutableException Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.
1373    */
1374   public T newInstance(Object outer) throws ExecutableException {
1375      if (isMemberClass() && isNotStatic() && noArgConstructor.isPresent())
1376         return noArgConstructor.get().<T>newInstance(outer);
1377      return newInstance();
1378   }
1379
1380   /**
1381    * Create a new instance of the main class of this declared type from a <c>String</c> input.
1382    *
1383    * <p>
1384    * In order to use this method, the class must have one of the following methods:
1385    * <ul>
1386    *    <li><code><jk>public static</jk> T valueOf(String in);</code>
1387    *    <li><code><jk>public static</jk> T fromString(String in);</code>
1388    *    <li><code><jk>public</jk> T(String in);</code>
1389    * </ul>
1390    *
1391    * @param outer
1392    *    The outer class object for non-static member classes.  Can be <jk>null</jk> for non-member or static classes.
1393    * @param arg The input argument value.
1394    * @return A new instance of the object, or <jk>null</jk> if there is no string constructor on the object.
1395    * @throws ExecutableException Exception occurred on invoked constructor/method/field.
1396    */
1397   @SuppressWarnings({
1398      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for enum/constructor instantiation
1399   })
1400   public T newInstanceFromString(Object outer, String arg) throws ExecutableException {
1401
1402      if (isEnum()) {
1403         try {
1404            return (T) EnumFormat.parse(arg, asEnumClass(inner()));
1405         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") IllegalArgumentException e) {
1406            if (marshallingContext.isIgnoreUnknownEnumValues())
1407               return null;
1408            throw new ExecutableException("Could not resolve enum value ''{0}'' on class ''{1}''", arg, cn(inner()));
1409         }
1410      }
1411
1412      if (fromStringMethod.isPresent())
1413         return (T)fromStringMethod.get().invoke(null, arg);
1414
1415      if (stringConstructor.isPresent()) {
1416         if (isMemberClass() && isNotStatic())
1417            return stringConstructor.get().<T>newInstance(outer, arg);
1418         return stringConstructor.get().<T>newInstance(arg);
1419      }
1420      throw new ExecutableException("No string constructor or valueOf(String) method found for class '" + cn(inner()) + "'");
1421   }
1422
1423   /**
1424    * Similar to {@link #equals(Object)} except primitive and Object types that are similar are considered the same.
1425    * (e.g. <jk>boolean</jk> == <c>Boolean</c>).
1426    *
1427    * @param cm The class meta to compare to.
1428    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified class-meta is equivalent to this one.
1429    */
1430   public boolean same(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1431      if (equals(cm))
1432         return true;
1433      return (isPrimitive() && cat.same(cm.cat));
1434   }
1435
1436   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
1437   public String toString() {
1438      return toString(false);
1439   }
1440
1441   /**
1442    * Same as {@link #toString()} except use simple class names.
1443    *
1444    * @param simple Print simple class names only (no package).
1445    * @return A new string.
1446    */
1447   public String toString(boolean simple) {
1448      return toString(new StringBuilder(), simple).toString();
1449   }
1450
1451   /**
1452    * Converts the specified object to a string.
1453    *
1454    * @param t The object to convert.
1455    * @return The object converted to a string, or <jk>null</jk> if the object was null.
1456    */
1457   public String toString(Object t) {
1458      if (t == null)
1459         return null;
1460      if (isEnum())
1461         return marshallingContext.getEnumFormat().format((Enum<?>)t);
1462      return t.toString();
1463   }
1464
1465   @SuppressWarnings({
1466      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for ObjectSwap<T,?>
1467   })
1468   private ObjectSwap<T,?> createSwap(Swap s) {
1469      var c = s.value();
1470      if (ClassUtils.isVoid(c))
1471         c = s.impl();
1472      var ci = info(c);
1473
1474      if (ci.isAssignableTo(ObjectSwap.class)) {
1475         var ps = BeanInstantiator.of(ObjectSwap.class).type(ci).run();
1476         if (s.mediaTypes().length > 0)
1477            ps.forMediaTypes(MediaType.ofAll(s.mediaTypes()));
1478         if (! s.template().isEmpty())
1479            ps.withTemplate(s.template());
1480         return ps;
1481      }
1482
1483      if (ci.isAssignableTo(Surrogate.class)) {
1484         List<SurrogateSwap<?,?>> l = SurrogateSwap.findObjectSwaps(c, marshallingContext);
1485         return first(l).map(x -> (ObjectSwap<T,?>)x).orElse(null);
1486      }
1487
1488      throw new ClassMetaRuntimeException(c, "Invalid swap class ''{0}'' specified.  Must extend from ObjectSwap or Surrogate.", c);
1489   }
1490
1491   private String findBeanDictionaryName() {
1492      if (marshallingContext == null)
1493         return null;
1494
1495      var d = beanMeta.get().optBeanMeta().map(x -> x.getDictionaryName()).orElse(null);
1496      if (nn(d))
1497         return d;
1498
1499      // Note that @Marshalled(typeName) can be defined on non-bean types, so
1500      // we have to check again.
1501      return marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider().find(Marshalled.class, this)
1502         .stream()
1503         .map(AnnotationInfo::inner)
1504         .filter(x -> ! x.typeName().isEmpty())
1505         .map(Marshalled::typeName)
1506         .findFirst()
1507         .orElse(null);
1508   }
1509
1510   private org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanMeta.BeanMetaValue<T> findBeanMeta() {
1511      if (! cat.isUnknown())
1512         return new org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanMeta.BeanMetaValue<>((org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanMeta<T>)null, "Known non-bean type");
1513      return org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.BeanMeta.create(this, implClass.get());
1514   }
1515
1516   private KeyValueTypes findKeyValueTypes() {
1517      if (cat.is(MAP) && ! cat.is(BEANMAP)) {
1518         // If this is a MAP, see if it's parameterized (e.g. AddressBook extends HashMap<String,Person>)
1519         var typeParams = marshallingContext.findParameters(inner(), inner());
1520         if (nn(typeParams) && typeParams.length == 2) {
1521            return new KeyValueTypes(typeParams[0], typeParams[1]);
1522         }
1523         return new KeyValueTypes(marshallingContext.getClassMeta(Object.class), marshallingContext.getClassMeta(Object.class));
1524      }
1525      return new KeyValueTypes(null, null);
1526   }
1527
1528   private ClassMeta<?> findElementType() {
1529      if (marshallingContext == null)
1530         return null;
1531      // Primitive optional types carry no generic parameter — synthesize the matching boxed element type so
1532      // the first-class optional path (serialize unwrap / parse element-typed wrap) has a target type.
1533      if (is(OptionalInt.class))
1534         return marshallingContext.getClassMeta(Integer.class);
1535      if (is(OptionalLong.class))
1536         return marshallingContext.getClassMeta(Long.class);
1537      if (is(OptionalDouble.class))
1538         return marshallingContext.getClassMeta(Double.class);
1539      if (cat.is(ARRAY)) {
1540         return marshallingContext.getClassMeta(inner().getComponentType());
1541      } else if (cat.is(COLLECTION) || cat.is(ITERABLE) || cat.is(ITERATOR) || cat.is(STREAM) || is(Optional.class)) {
1542         var typeParams = marshallingContext.findParameters(inner(), inner());
1543         if (nn(typeParams) && typeParams.length == 1) {
1544            return typeParams[0];
1545         }
1546         return marshallingContext.getClassMeta(Object.class);
1547      }
1548      return null;
1549   }
1550
1551   @SuppressWarnings({
1552      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for BuilderSwap<T,?>
1553   })
1554   private BuilderSwap<T,?> findBuilderSwap() {
1555      var bc = marshallingContext;
1556      if (bc == null)
1557         return null;
1558      return (BuilderSwap<T,?>)BuilderSwap.findSwapFromObjectClass(bc, inner(), bc.getBeanConstructorVisibility(), bc.getBeanMethodVisibility());
1559   }
1560
1561   @SuppressWarnings({
1562      "unchecked",   // Type erasure requires cast for List<ObjectSwap<T,?>>
1563      "java:S3776"   // Cognitive complexity acceptable for swap resolution logic
1564   })
1565   private List<ObjectSwap<T,?>> findSwaps() {
1566      if (marshallingContext == null)
1567         return l();
1568
1569      var list = new ArrayList<ObjectSwap<T,?>>();
1570      var swapArray = marshallingContext.getSwaps();
1571      if (! swapArray.isEmpty()) {
1572         var innerClass = inner();
1573         for (var f : swapArray)
1574            if (f.getNormalClass().isAssignableFrom(innerClass))
1575               list.add((ObjectSwap<T,?>)f);
1576      }
1577
1578      var ap = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider();
1579      ap.find(Swap.class, this).stream().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).forEach(x -> list.add(createSwap(x)));
1580
1581      // @Marshalled(as=STRING) installs an AutoStringSwap before any auto-detection.
1582      if (list.isEmpty()) {
1583         var marshalledList = ap.find(Marshalled.class, this);
1584         if (marshalledList.stream().anyMatch(x -> x.inner().as() == MarshalledAs.STRING))
1585            list.add(new AutoStringSwap<>(this));
1586      }
1587
1588      // @MarshalledIgnore on TYPE — skip entirely: serialize as null, parse as null.
1589      // Use String.class (not Object.class) as swapClass so sType.isObject() stays false
1590      // and the serializer correctly emits "null" when swap() returns null.
1591      if (list.isEmpty() && ap.has(MarshalledIgnore.class, this))
1592         list.add(new ObjectSwap<T,String>(inner(), String.class) {
1593            @Override public String swap(MarshallingSession session, T o) { return null; }
1594            @Override public T unswap(MarshallingSession session, String s, ClassMeta<?> hint) { return null; }
1595         });
1596
1597      var ds = DefaultSwaps.find(this);
1598      if (ds == null && !isStreamable()) {
1599         ds = AutoObjectSwap.find(marshallingContext, this);
1600      if (ds == null)
1601         ds = AutoNumberSwap.find(marshallingContext, this);
1602      if (ds == null)
1603         ds = AutoMapSwap.find(marshallingContext, this);
1604      if (ds == null)
1605         ds = AutoListSwap.find(marshallingContext, this);
1606      }
1607
1608      if (nn(ds))
1609         list.add((ObjectSwap<T,?>)ds);
1610
1611      return u(list);
1612   }
1613
1614   private List<ObjectSwap<?,?>> findChildSwaps() {
1615      if (marshallingContext == null)
1616         return l();
1617      var swapArray = marshallingContext.getSwaps();
1618      if (swapArray.isEmpty())
1619         return l();
1620      var list = new ArrayList<ObjectSwap<?,?>>();
1621      var innerClass = inner();
1622      for (var f : swapArray)
1623         if (f.getNormalClass().isAssignableTo(innerClass))
1624            list.add(f);
1625      return u(list);
1626   }
1627
1628   private BidiMap<Object,String> findEnumValues() {
1629      if (! isEnum())
1630         return BidiMap.<Object,String>create().unmodifiable().build();
1631
1632      var bc = marshallingContext;
1633      var fmt = nn(bc) ? bc.getEnumFormat() : EnumFormat.TO_STRING;
1634
1635      var m = BidiMap.<Object,String>create().unmodifiable();
1636      stream(asEnumClass(inner()).getEnumConstants()).forEach(x -> m.add(x, fmt.format(x)));
1637      return m.build();
1638   }
1639
1640   private String findExample() {
1641
1642      var ex = beanMeta.get().optBeanMeta().map(x -> (MarshalledFilter) x.getBeanFilter()).map(x -> x.getExample()).orElse(null);
1643
1644      if (ex == null)
1645         ex = marshalledFilter.map(x -> x.getExample()).orElse(null);
1646
1647      if (ex == null && nn(marshallingContext))
1648         ex = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider().find(Example.class, this).stream().map(x -> x.inner().value()).filter(Utils::ne).findFirst().orElse(null);
1649
1650      if (ex == null) {
1651         if (isAny(boolean.class, Boolean.class)) {
1652            ex = "true";
1653         } else if (isAny(char.class, Character.class)) {
1654            ex = "a";
1655         } else if (cat.is(CHARSEQ)) {
1656            ex = "foo";
1657         } else if (cat.is(ENUM)) {
1658            Optional<Enum<?>> e = first(EnumSet.allOf(asEnumClass(inner())));
1659            ex = e.map(x -> marshallingContext.getEnumFormat().format(x)).orElse(null);
1660         } else if (isAny(float.class, Float.class, double.class, Double.class)) {
1661            ex = "1.0";
1662         } else if (isAny(short.class, Short.class, int.class, Integer.class, long.class, Long.class)) {
1663            ex = "1";
1664         }
1665      }
1666
1667      return ex;
1668   }
1669
1670   private FieldInfo findExampleField() {
1671      var ap = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider();
1672
1673      return getDeclaredFields()
1674         .stream()
1675         .filter(x -> x.isStatic() && isAssignableFrom(x.getFieldType()) && ap.has(Example.class, x))
1676         .map(x -> x.accessible())
1677         .findFirst()
1678         .orElse(null);
1679   }
1680
1681   private MethodInfo findExampleMethod() {
1682      // @formatter:off
1683      var ap = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider();
1684
1685      // Option 1:  Public example() or @Example method.
1686      var m = getPublicMethod(
1687         x -> x.isStatic() && x.isNotDeprecated() && (x.hasName("example") || ap.has(Example.class, x)) && x.hasParameterTypesLenient(MarshallingSession.class)
1688      );
1689      if (m.isPresent()) return m.get();
1690
1691      // Option 2:  Non-public @Example method.
1692      return getDeclaredMethods()
1693         .stream()
1694         .flatMap(x -> x.getMatchingMethods().stream())
1695         .filter(x -> x.isStatic() && ap.has(Example.class, x))
1696         .map(x -> x.accessible())
1697         .findFirst()
1698         .orElse(null);
1699      // @formatter:on
1700   }
1701
1702   private MethodInfo findFromStringMethod() {
1703      // Find static fromString(String) or equivalent method.
1704      // fromString() must be checked before valueOf() so that Enum classes can create their own
1705      //    specialized fromString() methods to override the behavior of Enum.valueOf(String).
1706      // valueOf() is used by enums.
1707      // parse() is used by the java logging Level class.
1708      // forName() is used by Class and Charset
1709      // @formatter:off
1710      var names = a("fromString", "fromValue", "valueOf", "parse", "parseString", "forName", "forString");
1711      return getPublicMethod(
1712         x -> x.isStatic() && x.isNotDeprecated() && x.hasReturnType(this) && x.hasParameterTypes(String.class) && contains(x.getName(), names)
1713      ).orElse(null);
1714      // @formatter:on
1715   }
1716
1717   @SuppressWarnings({
1718      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for ClassInfoTyped<? extends T>
1719   })
1720   private ClassInfoTyped<? extends T> findImplClass() {
1721
1722      if (is(Object.class))
1723         return null;
1724
1725      var mf = marshalledFilter.get();
1726      if (mf == null)
1727         return null;
1728      var implClassInfo = mf.getImplClass();
1729      if (implClassInfo == null)
1730         return null;
1731      return (ClassInfoTyped<? extends T>)implClassInfo;
1732   }
1733
1734   private MarshalledFilter findMarshalledFilter() {
1735      var ap = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider();
1736      var l = ap.find(Marshalled.class, this);
1737      var bt = ap.find(BeanType.class, this);
1738      if (l.isEmpty() && bt.isEmpty())
1739         return null;
1740      return MarshalledFilter.create(this)
1741         .applyAnnotations(reverse(l.stream().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList()))
1742         .applyBeanTypeAnnotations(reverse(bt.stream().map(AnnotationInfo::inner).toList()))
1743         .build();
1744   }
1745
1746   @SuppressWarnings({
1747      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for name property detection with annotation traversal
1748   })
1749   private Property<T,Object> findNameProperty() {
1750      var ap = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider();
1751
1752      var s = getAllFields()
1753         .stream()
1754         .filter(x -> ap.has(NameProperty.class, x))
1755         .map(x -> x.accessible())
1756         .map(x -> Property.<T,Object>create().field(x).build())
1757         .findFirst();
1758
1759      if (s.isPresent()) return s.get();
1760
1761      var builder = Property.<T,Object>create();
1762
1763      // Look for setter method (1 parameter) with @NameProperty
1764      var setterMethod = getAllMethods()
1765         .stream()
1766         .filter(x -> ap.has(NameProperty.class, x) && x.hasNumParameters(1))
1767         .findFirst();
1768
1769      if (setterMethod.isPresent()) {
1770         builder.setter(setterMethod.get().accessible());
1771
1772         // Try to find a corresponding getter method (even if not annotated)
1773         // If setter is "setName", look for "getName" or "isName"
1774         var setterName = setterMethod.get().getNameSimple();
1775         if (setterName.startsWith("set") && setterName.length() > 3) {
1776            var propertyName = setterName.substring(3);
1777            var getterName1 = "get" + propertyName;
1778            var getterName2 = "is" + propertyName;
1779
1780            var getter = getAllMethods()
1781               .stream()
1782               .filter(x -> !x.isStatic() && x.hasNumParameters(0) &&
1783                  (x.hasName(getterName1) || x.hasName(getterName2)) &&
1784                  !x.getReturnType().is(Void.TYPE))
1785               .findFirst();
1786
1787            if (getter.isPresent()) {
1788               builder.getter(getter.get().accessible());
1789            } else {
1790               // Try to find a field with the property name (lowercase first letter)
1791               var fieldName = Character.toLowerCase(propertyName.charAt(0)) + propertyName.substring(1);
1792               var field = getAllFields()
1793                  .stream()
1794                  .filter(x -> !x.isStatic() && x.hasName(fieldName))
1795                  .findFirst();
1796
1797               if (field.isPresent()) {
1798                  var f = field.get().accessible();
1799                  builder.getter(f::get);
1800               }
1801            }
1802         }
1803      }
1804
1805      // Look for getter method (0 parameters, non-void return) with @NameProperty
1806      var getterMethod = getAllMethods()
1807         .stream()
1808         .filter(x -> ap.has(NameProperty.class, x) && x.hasNumParameters(0) && !x.getReturnType().is(Void.TYPE))
1809         .findFirst();
1810
1811      if (getterMethod.isPresent()) {
1812         builder.getter(getterMethod.get().accessible());
1813      }
1814
1815      // Return null if neither setter nor getter was found
1816      if (setterMethod.isEmpty() && getterMethod.isEmpty())
1817         return null;
1818
1819      return builder.build();
1820   }
1821
1822   private ConstructorInfo findNoArgConstructor() {
1823
1824      if (is(Object.class))
1825         return null;
1826
1827      if (implClass.isPresent())
1828         return implClass.get().getPublicConstructor(x -> x.hasNumParameters(0)).orElse(null);
1829
1830      if (isAbstract())
1831         return null;
1832
1833      var numParams = isMemberClass() && isNotStatic() ? 1 : 0;
1834      return getPublicConstructors()
1835         .stream()
1836         .filter(x -> x.isPublic() && x.isNotDeprecated() && x.hasNumParameters(numParams))
1837         .findFirst()
1838         .orElse(null);
1839   }
1840
1841   @SuppressWarnings({
1842      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for parent property detection with annotation traversal
1843   })
1844   private Property<T,Object> findParentProperty() {
1845      var ap = marshallingContext.getAnnotationProvider();
1846
1847      var s = getAllFields()
1848         .stream()
1849         .filter(x -> ap.has(ParentProperty.class, x))
1850         .map(x -> x.accessible())
1851         .map(x -> Property.<T,Object>create().field(x).build())
1852         .findFirst();
1853
1854      if (s.isPresent()) return s.get();
1855
1856      var builder = Property.<T,Object>create();
1857
1858      // Look for setter method (1 parameter) with @ParentProperty
1859      var setterMethod = getAllMethods()
1860         .stream()
1861         .filter(x -> ap.has(ParentProperty.class, x) && x.hasNumParameters(1))
1862         .findFirst();
1863
1864      if (setterMethod.isPresent()) {
1865         builder.setter(setterMethod.get().accessible());
1866
1867         // Try to find a corresponding getter method (even if not annotated)
1868         // If setter is "setParent", look for "getParent" or "isParent"
1869         var setterName = setterMethod.get().getNameSimple();
1870         if (setterName.startsWith("set") && setterName.length() > 3) {
1871            var propertyName = setterName.substring(3);
1872            var getterName1 = "get" + propertyName;
1873            var getterName2 = "is" + propertyName;
1874
1875            var getter = getAllMethods()
1876               .stream()
1877               .filter(x -> !x.isStatic() && x.hasNumParameters(0) &&
1878                  (x.hasName(getterName1) || x.hasName(getterName2)) &&
1879                  !x.getReturnType().is(Void.TYPE))
1880               .findFirst();
1881
1882            if (getter.isPresent()) {
1883               builder.getter(getter.get().accessible());
1884            } else {
1885               // Try to find a field with the property name (lowercase first letter)
1886               var fieldName = Character.toLowerCase(propertyName.charAt(0)) + propertyName.substring(1);
1887               var field = getAllFields()
1888                  .stream()
1889                  .filter(x -> !x.isStatic() && x.hasName(fieldName))
1890                  .findFirst();
1891
1892               if (field.isPresent()) {
1893                  var f = field.get().accessible();
1894                  builder.getter(f::get);
1895               }
1896            }
1897         }
1898      }
1899
1900      // Look for getter method (0 parameters, non-void return) with @ParentProperty
1901      var getterMethod = getAllMethods()
1902         .stream()
1903         .filter(x -> ap.has(ParentProperty.class, x) && x.hasNumParameters(0) && !x.getReturnType().is(Void.TYPE))
1904         .findFirst();
1905
1906      if (getterMethod.isPresent()) {
1907         builder.getter(getterMethod.get().accessible());
1908      }
1909
1910      // Return null if neither setter nor getter was found
1911      if (setterMethod.isEmpty() && getterMethod.isEmpty())
1912         return null;
1913
1914      return builder.build();
1915   }
1916
1917   private ConstructorInfo findStringConstructor() {
1918
1919      if (is(Object.class) || isAbstract())
1920         return null;
1921
1922      if (implClass.isPresent())
1923         return implClass.get().getPublicConstructor(x -> x.hasParameterTypes(String.class)).orElse(null);
1924
1925      if (isAbstract())
1926         return null;
1927
1928      var numParams = isMemberClass() && isNotStatic() ? 2 : 1;
1929      return getPublicConstructors()
1930         .stream()
1931         .filter(x -> x.isPublic() && x.isNotDeprecated() && x.hasNumParameters(numParams))
1932         .filter(x -> x.getParameter(numParams == 2 ? 1 : 0).isType(String.class))
1933         .findFirst()
1934         .orElse(null);
1935   }
1936
1937   /**
1938    * Returns the {@link ObjectSwap} where the specified class is the same/subclass of the normal class of one of the
1939    * child POJO swaps associated with this class.
1940    *
1941    * @param normalClass The normal class being resolved.
1942    * @return The resolved {@link ObjectSwap} or <jk>null</jk> if none were found.
1943    */
1944   protected ObjectSwap<?,?> getChildObjectSwapForSwap(Class<?> normalClass) {
1945      return childSwapMap.get(normalClass);
1946   }
1947
1948   /**
1949    * Returns the {@link ObjectSwap} where the specified class is the same/subclass of the swap class of one of the child
1950    * POJO swaps associated with this class.
1951    *
1952    * @param swapClass The swap class being resolved.
1953    * @return The resolved {@link ObjectSwap} or <jk>null</jk> if none were found.
1954    */
1955   protected ObjectSwap<?,?> getChildObjectSwapForUnswap(Class<?> swapClass) {
1956      return childUnswapMap.get(swapClass);
1957   }
1958
1959   /**
1960    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this class or any child classes has a {@link ObjectSwap} associated with it.
1961    *
1962    * <p>
1963    * Used when transforming bean properties to prevent having to look up transforms if we know for certain that no
1964    * transforms are associated with a bean property.
1965    *
1966    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this class or any child classes has a {@link ObjectSwap} associated with it.
1967    */
1968   protected boolean hasChildSwaps() {
1969      return ! childSwaps.get().isEmpty();
1970   }
1971
1972   /**
1973    * Appends this object as a readable string to the specified string builder.
1974    *
1975    * @param sb The string builder to append this object to.
1976    * @param simple Print simple class names only (no package).
1977    * @return The passed-in string builder.
1978    */
1979   protected StringBuilder toString(StringBuilder sb, boolean simple) {
1980      var n = simple ? cnsq(inner()) : cn(inner());
1981      if (cat.is(ARRAY))
1982         return elementType.get().toString(sb, simple).append('[').append(']');
1983      if (cat.is(BEANMAP))
1984         return sb.append(cn(BeanMap.class)).append('<').append(n).append('>');
1985      if (cat.is(MAP)) {
1986         var kvTypes = keyValueTypes.get();
1987         var kt = kvTypes.optKeyType();
1988         var vt = kvTypes.optValueType();
1989         if (kt.isPresent() && vt.isPresent() && kt.get().isObject() && vt.get().isObject())
1990            return sb.append(n);
1991         return sb.append(n).append('<').append(kt.map(x -> x.toString(simple)).orElse("?")).append(',').append(vt.map(x -> x.toString(simple)).orElse("?")).append('>');
1992      }
1993      if (cat.is(COLLECTION) || is(Optional.class)) {
1994         var et = elementType.get();
1995         String typeString = et != null ? et.toString(simple) : "?";
1996         return sb.append(n).append(et != null && et.isObject() ? "" : "<" + typeString + ">");
1997      }
1998      return sb.append(n);
1999   }
2000}
